texto: She doesn’t snarl. She smiles instead, but it is a half smile. She is hiding something, an imperfection. There is something about her teeth, the sides of them that she doesn’t want me to see. I am fascinated by this unseen flaw. I want to know what she is hiding. Perhaps this is what is missing from my life, some mysterious flaw that I won’t want to correct
explicacao: Citação de Lacey Reah sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “She doesn’t snarl. She smiles instead, but it is a half smile. She is hiding something, an imperf…” articula reflexao, fireflies, flaw em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como flaw e smile.
